articles.title: Pedestrian killed in Roxbury hit-and-run
articles.description:
The victim was pronounced dead at a local hospital, police said.

articles.title: ‘Saturday Night Live UK’ aims to take a comedy hit across the pond. The first verdicts are in.
articles.description:
The 75-minute show opened with a skit showing Prime Minister Keir Starmer seeking help from a Gen Z adviser about how to talk to President Donald Trump, before the proclamation: “Live from London, it’s Saturday night!”

The post ‘Saturday Night Live UK’ aims to take a comedy hit across the pond. The first verdicts are in. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: ‘Saturday Night Live UK’ premiered with a skit featuring Prime Minister Keir Starmer.
The 75-minute show aims to adapt the popular US comedy format for UK audiences.
Boston comedy fans may see increased interest in live comedy events following the show's debut.
